rawContent: {"stage":"review-fix","insights":[{"kind":"lesson","text":"Payload CMS exposes afterOpenConnection callback in payload.config.ts for connection lifecycle monitoring and logging.","scope":"src/payload.config.ts"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Stale comments referencing removed types (PayloadMcpApiKey) were left behind after cleanup — keep comments in sync when removing types.","scope":"src/payload.config.ts"},{"kind":"convention","text":"MongoDB pool monitoring utilities belong in src/infra/db/ following the existing infrastructure directory structure.","scope":"src/infra/db"},{"kind":"decision","text":"MongooseAdapter already exposes pool stats via _pool — use the built-in interface rather than wrapping with custom state.","scope":"src/infra/db/pool-stats.ts"}]}
